mapper.select: select (case when degree=1 then '初中' when degree=2 then '高中' when degree=3 then '大专' when degree=4 then '本科' when degree=5 then '硕士' when degree=6 then '博士' else '其他' end) degree, count(*) value from student group by degree order by value desc
SELECT COALESCE(c.name,'其他') clazz_id, COUNT(*) num FROM student s LEFT JOIN clazz c ON s.clazz_id=c.id GROUP BY s.clazz_id,c.name ORDER BY num DESC
